name: Tuna Noodle Casserole #2
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, thoroughly combine soup, sherry, milk, parsley flakes, vegetables, and tuna.
2. Fold in noodles.
3. Pour into greased CROCK-POT.
4. Top with almonds and butter.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 7 to 9 hours (or High for 2 to 3 hours).
6. Do not overcook noodles; just until tender.
